retry_reason: If the list is empty, the put is not executed; retrying would not change the condition and may indicate a double-removal or missing reference.
contract_summary: This put-wrapper removes a fw_event_work from its list and drops one reference count on it. The caller must ensure the fw_event is currently on the list before calling; if it is not, the reference is not released. After this call, the caller must not access the fw_event unless it holds another valid reference. The function is thread-safe under the ioc->fw_event_lock.
